description: A company decides to start working with a new supplier. An agent must set them up in the system.

nodes.task_description: Gather the new supplier's information, including contact details, payment terms, and product catalog.

expected_outcome.value: Agent collects all the necessary supplier data.

nodes.task_description: Create a new supplier record in the procurement system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates the new supplier account.

nodes.task_description: Upload the supplier's product catalog and pricing into the system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully adds the new products to the company's catalog.
